samples.xml_description: Implement an unsigned 8bit multiplier based on pipelining processing. Clock. Active-low reset. Input enable. Multiplicand. Multiplier. Output enable. Product. MUL_WIDTH Reset the internal states. always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin if (!rst_n) begin mul_en_out_reg <= 0; mul_a_reg <= 0; mul_b_reg <= 0; end end Update the internal states. always @(posedge clk) begin mul_en_out_reg <= {mul_en_out_reg[1:0], mul_en_in}; mul_a_reg <= mul_a; mul_b_reg <= mul_b; end Generate the partial products. genvar i; generate for (i = 0; i < 8; i = i + 1) begin : AND_GEN assign temp[i] = mul_a_reg && mul_b_reg[i] ? mul_b_reg : 0; end endgenerate Calculate the partial sum. genvar j; generate for (j = 0; j < 7; j = j + 1) begin : ADD_GEN if (j == 0) begin assign sum[j] = temp[j][j+1:0] + temp[j+1][j+1:0]; end else begin assign sum[j] = sum[j-1] + temp[j][j+1:0]; end end endgenerate Calculate the final product. assign mul_out = mul_en_out ? sum[6] : 0;
